name: Global Shop Solutions ERP REST API
what_it_does: Global Shop Solutions manufacturing ERP REST API for job shops, custom manufacturers, and discrete manufacturers to manage sales orders, production scheduling, shop floor control, inventory, purchasing, shipping, and accounting — enabling automated manufacturing order management, capacity planning, real-time shop floor visibility, and supply chain integration through Global Shop Solutions' purpose-built job shop and discrete manufacturing ERP. Enables AI agents to manage sales orders for customer quote and order management automation, handle production scheduling for job scheduling and capacity planning automation, access shop floor control for work center routing and operation tracking automation, retrieve inventory management for raw material and WIP inventory automation, manage purchasing for vendor purchase order and receiving automation, handle shipping for order fulfillment and shipping document automation, access accounting for job costing and financial reporting automation, retrieve labor tracking for employee time entry and efficiency reporting automation, manage quality control for inspection and non-conformance management automation, and integrate Global Shop with CAD, EDI, and customer portals for job shop manufacturing automation.
use_cases: Automating customer quote-to-production order workflow for job shop automation agents
Scheduling manufacturing jobs and managing shop floor capacity for production automation agents
Tracking WIP and job costs in real time for manufacturing cost control automation agents
Managing raw material purchasing and inventory for job shop supply chain automation agents
not_for: Process manufacturing (Global Shop is job shop/discrete, not batch process or chemical manufacturing)
Large enterprise discrete manufacturing (Global Shop targets SMB/mid-market, not Tier 1 automotive ERP)
Distribution-only operations (Global Shop is manufacturing ERP, not pure distribution WMS)
best_when: A job shop, custom manufacturer, or discrete manufacturer wanting AI agents to automate sales order processing, production scheduling, shop floor tracking, and job costing through Global Shop Solutions' purpose-built manufacturing ERP.
avoid_when: ON-PREMISES OR CLOUD BOTH AVAILABLE: Global Shop offers both on-premises and cloud deployment; automated cloud-only assumption creates deployment_mismatch for on-premises customers; automated must configure API endpoint for correct deployment model. JOB ROUTING IS MANUFACTURER-SPECIFIC: Production routings are manufacturer-defined with custom operations; automated universal-routing assumption creates routing_not_found for manufacturer-specific work center operations; automated must query manufacturer's configured routings. CAPACITY PLANNING IS FINITE: Global Shop capacity planning uses finite scheduling; automated infinite-capacity assumption creates overloaded_schedule for capacity-constrained operations; automated must respect capacity constraints in scheduling. EDI INTEGRATION IS SEPARATE: Electronic data interchange with customers requires EDI setup; automated auto-EDI assumption creates no_edi_connection without configured EDI trading partner; automated must configure EDI trading partner relationships.

auth.notes: Global Shop Solutions uses API key for manufacturing ERP REST API. REST API with JSON. The Woodlands, TX HQ. Founded 1976. Products: Global Shop Solutions ERP (job shop, discrete manufacturing). 2,700+ manufacturers in 25+ countries. Industries: aerospace, defense, medical, automotive, industrial. Private company. Competes with Plex, Epicor, and JobBoss for job shop and discrete manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified manufacturers; production requires Global Shop subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; on-premises and cloud options; implementation services extra
pricing.notes: The Woodlands TX. Annual subscription. 2,700+ manufacturers. Job shop manufacturing ERP leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; ERP APIs throttled per deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: JOB NUMBER IS PRIMARY REFERENCE: Global Shop uses job number as primary production tracking reference; automated order-number assumption creates tracking_gap for jobs tracked by job number vs sales order number; automated must use Global Shop job number for production tracking

WORK CENTER CAPACITY IS MANUALLY MANAGED: Shop capacity is defined per work center; automated dynamic-capacity assumption creates scheduling_error for work centers with manually updated capacity; automated must account for work center availability when scheduling

MATERIAL ISSUES AFFECT JOB COST: Raw material issues to jobs drive job costing; automated auto-costing assumption creates cost_inaccuracy for jobs without proper material issue transactions; automated must record material issues to jobs for accurate job costing

OUTSIDE PROCESSING ROUTES TO VENDOR: Jobs can route to external vendors for outside processing; automated in-house-only assumption creates missing_operation for jobs with outside processing routing steps; automated must handle outside processing purchase orders

CLOSED JOBS PREVENT TRANSACTIONS: Closed production jobs reject new transactions; automated open-forever assumption creates transaction_rejected for closed jobs; automated must check job status before posting labor, material, or other transactions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP. SOC2, ITAR. API key. US. Production, inventory, and job cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP. SOC2, ITAR. API key. US. Job shop production and inventory data.
